title: I shipped a full React app in 2 hours with Cursor AI
post:
Two hours.

That's how long it took me to ship a fully functional React dashboard with authentication, data visualization, and a REST API integration.

I didn't write a single line manually. I prompted, reviewed, iterated, and shipped. Cursor AI handled the boilerplate, the component logic, even the edge cases I would have missed.

The result isn't perfect — production code needs polish. But the speed of initial implementation is genuinely game-changing.

I'm now convinced: the bottleneck isn't building anymore. It's knowing what to build.

What would you ship if implementation took 2 hours? Thoughts?
